item.title: Additonal education
item.description: English 2024 Organization: Maxim Technology education 2023-09-19 - 2024-03-28 Remote intermediate English. Joined an English group to maintain practice.

item.title: stacktraces-errors
item.description: This is an entity home for tagstacktrace-exception-error I collect stack traces and mark them withstacktrace-exception-error tag. I engaged in organizing a repository for collecting information about software errors.

item.title: Companies
item.description: Maxim technology 2023-08-. – now(), full time Software Engineer Project: Voice order Career Break 2022-10-01 – 2023-08-18 Personal goal pursuit Practiced programming tasks.

item.title: CV
item.description: Projects A list of projects I participated during my professional career. Companies A list of companies I worked for. Education Saint Petersburg State University for Water Communications 2007-01 - 2012-06 Major: Information Systems Qualification: Engineer After years of hard work and dedication, I successfully graduated as an Information Systems Engineer.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Voice order company: Maxim Technology Implemented from scratch to high-CCU production and became a maintainer of a backend microservice. The service enables taxi passengers order a taxi via giving commands as an answer to voice guidance.

item.title: Welcome to Ivan Kopylov
item.description: Hey, I am Ivan 🖐 This is my personal page where I post different things related to my area of interest. You can start by just haphazardly exploring this digital garden to accidentally come across to something interesting.
